textByHash.26c21d32eb6289a7940fae960ac0a625ea0c1197: That'sh alright then, here you go.
textByHash.2c491566da2934435bee902629ae9e144471ed6a: Hmm, that shtout was delicious... here, have my invaluable Kelda hop sheed now, it wash my lasht one.
textByHash.2cd161d7327adf00c82949e7cbbf02cff442663c: I've never ashked you for a drink in my life!
textByHash.3162b9611603e6bbe31ac272af122c055d072b54: Hey, err... wait... wait a second! Hey, wait!
textByHash.38692223e41a3bab96c45249cb540b7e7f10315e: That ish shimple! Help yourshelf to the dwarvern shtout! I mean dwarfen! I mean...
textByHash.3a6300c91e0ca49e20a07c0854e683126175d097: Oooh, jusht a glash of dwarven shtout over there...
textByHash.3abe4da410d12a52446f715e95376c0568b41716: Never got to test it, love to shee it shoot a real human!
textByHash.3d400229ea64ec5a5f515a5086c10db3dba88d5f: I'm not shure what I mean.
textByHash.5eac4779221b758d6a3abc1250102065550a300c: Just give me a drink and I'll gladly help you.
textByHash.6220d0f89dab71f48cee1a2e7859f5612c618f4d: You are going to give it back after you're done widdit, right?
textByHash.68f23541cea879cd48b1ca592b74fa7f356c47e5: That'sh very deshent of you, human.
textByHash.6ca6aaeb4b45e9239948e26b3b3a7751fc8cf625: Pffft, I only wanted a dwarven shtout from that table over there.
textByHash.80cdc46ec53b4158a9fa87bec78a2a6446409e54: Oh, we've got an expert here! Kelda shtout is delishious!
textByHash.862801caff45b44bfe9b300eae2da2d3a2a38a35: [laugh], yesh, I have jusht the shing!
textByHash.879002699ba6666304b32717ba6122edb8bd30e3: Ooooh, heeellooo! Anyshing a bright dwarf like me can help you with?
textByHash.89e6003e7b209f78d00df808d32843217f950345: Oooh, shure, shure... I've only got one part left, though, I gave all the other parts away.
textByHash.a2145782de661b7525933d446c5eddbf3e22551d: I've been working on thish deshign for quite a while now!
textByHash.ae1d0497fc085a2cca814676429e32e1ba92ff1c: Alright, you talked me into it.
textByHash.b0cb1266ec29b91a904f904d648bd728451e0f66: And a dwarven shtout against a Kelda hop seed? I'm not sure if that'sh a fair trade.
textByHash.b37d425ea8d068f9f3f6ba8bc80a33731276e4cf: Sho have you been shot out of a cannon yet?
textByHash.c286e9c88370571abc135e697071250e79b5cacd: That'sh wonderful! You're a good human, you are. Here, have thish schematic and have fun with it!
textByHash.c9eb5ae0508144531e3b7b68cffbfba26660d4b8: Oh, I've got a sheed you might like to borrow!
textByHash.d7adab62b61b137a209236397e9f986f102b33da: How are you goin' to give me back my sheed once you've made the Kelda stout? You'll be too drunk to find your way back here!
textByHash.e3f4147193d2ed50174d812fc3fccbe45ee0751a: Well it'sh hardly a big deal, ish it? We've got a huge shupply of dwarven shtouts right here.
textByHash.e77b409d38a7580b434c0e0b2d28bef618b9a97f: Here, have the shtupid schematic, I've gone right off my drink now.
textByHash.ea870db69656217d0f4cb22de79f3d183cbf55ea: How should I know? I'm only a shimple dwarf.
